taskTemplate.name: Send Counteroffer
taskTemplate.description: Send counteroffer notice to borrower with revised loan terms

subTaskTemplate.name: MA Review Form Board Required
subTaskTemplate.description: MA Review Form Board Required – Complete and include the Massachusetts Review Board form; required for MA first-position purchase or refinance loans before sending counteroffer
subTaskTemplate.type: Send Counteroffer – MA Review Form Board Required

subTaskTemplate.name: Send Counteroffer Electronically
subTaskTemplate.description: Send Counteroffer Electronically – Send counteroffer to borrower electronically; ensure all required documents are saved in the Counteroffer eFolder document before sending

subTaskTemplate.name: Mail Counteroffer
subTaskTemplate.description: Mail Counteroffer – Mail the counteroffer package to the borrower; required for MA first-position purchase or refinance loans in lieu of electronic delivery

taskTemplate.name: Scheduling
taskTemplate.description: Obtain closing date and time from branch

subTaskTemplate.name: Obtain Closing Date and Time from Branch
subTaskTemplate.description: Obtain Closing Date and Time from Branch – Contact the branch to obtain the confirmed closing date and time for this loan
subTaskTemplate.type: Scheduling – Obtain Closing Date and Time from Branch

taskTemplate.name: Create Closing Package
taskTemplate.description: Prepare and send complete closing document package

subTaskTemplate.name: Create Closing Package
subTaskTemplate.description: Create Closing Package – Generate and assemble the complete closing document package for this loan
subTaskTemplate.type: Create Closing Package – Create Closing Package
